other.name: Death Guard Defenders
other.description: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Death Guard Infantry^^** units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

other.name: Fevered Strategist
other.description: Once per Battle Round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when a friendly ^^**Death Guard^^** unit within 12" of that model is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that Stratagem by 1CP.

other.name: Miasma of Pestilence (Aura)
other.description: While a friendly ^^**Death Guard^^** unit is within 6" of this model, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

composition.equipment: equipped with: ➤ Hellforged weapons - strike; ➤ Hellforged weapons - sweep; Infernal cannon.

datasheets.name: Daemon Prince of Nurgle with wings

other.name: Horrifying Visage
other.description: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

other.name: Enfeebling Miasma (Aura)
other.description: While an enemy unit (excluding ^^*Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**) is within 6" of this model, each time that unit is selected to Fall Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

composition.equipment: equipped with: ➤ Hellforged weapons - strike; ➤ Hellforged weapons - sweep; Infernal cannon.

other.name: The Destroyer Hive
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a melee attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

other.name: Eater Plague (Psychic)
other.description: In your Shooting phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this ^^**Psyker^^** (excluding units with the Lone Operative ability that are not part of an Attached unit and are not within 12" of this ^^**Psyker^^** and roll one D6: on a 1, this ^^**Psyker^^**'s unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers D6 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

composition.equipment: equipped with: ➤ Lakrimae - strike; ➤ Lakrimae - sweep.

other.name: Virulent Aura
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

other.name: Blight Bombardment
other.description: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 30" of and visible to this model. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly ^^**Death Guard^^** unit makes a ranged attack that targets that unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 (if that attack is made with a Blast weapon, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead).

composition.equipment: equipped with: Power fist; Twin plague spewer.

other.name: Vector of Disease
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the **[Sustained Hits 1]** and **[Lance]** abilties.

other.name: Unholy Resilience
other.description: The first time a model with this ability is destroyed in a battle round, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set that model back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with 3 wounds remaining. Each model can only be set up in this way once per battle.

composition.equipment: equipped with: ➤ Manreaper - strike; ➤ Manreaper - sweep.

other.name: Gift of Contagion (Psychic)
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack which targets a unit which is Afflicted, that attack has the [Sustained Hits 1] ability.

other.name: Pestilent Fallout (Psychic)
other.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy ^^**Infantry^^** unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with its Plague Wind. Until the end of your opponent's next turn, that unit is enfeebled. While a unit is enfeebled, subtract 2" from the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Corrupted staff; ➤ Plague Wind - witchfire; ➤ Plague Wind - focused witchfire; Bolt pistol.

other.name: Infused with the Blessings of Nurgle
other.description: In your Shooting phase, each time this unit is selected to shoot, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that unit is Afflicted.

other.name: Curse of the Walking Pox
other.description:
Each time a ^^**Poxwalker^^** model in this unit makes an attack that destroys an enemy model (excluding ^^**Monster^^** and ^^**Vehicle^^** models), after this unit has resolved its attacks, you can return one destroyed ^^**Poxwalker^^** model to this unit.

While ^^**Typhus^^** is leading this unit, enemy models destroyed as a result of ^^**Typhus^^**’ Eater Plague ability count as enemy models destroyed by an attack made by a ^^**Poxwalker^^** model in this unit for the purposes of this ability.

other.name: Sickening Vitality
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, add 1" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

other.name: Tocsin of Misery (Aura)
other.description: In the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, if an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength is within 9" of this model, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if it is a ^^**Psyker^^** unit.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Cursed plague bell; ➤ Plasma pistol - standard; ➤ Plasma pistol - supercharge.

other.name: Putrefying Stink
other.description: Enemy models cannot start or end an Advance move within 9" of this model.

other.name: Blinding Spray
other.description: In the Fight phase, you can select one model from your army with this ability to use this ability. If you do, until the end of that phase, that model's unit has the Fights First ability. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per battle.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Close combat weapon; Plague sprayer.

other.name: Extraction of Fresh Disease
other.description: The first time this model's unit destroys an enemy unit as a result of a melee attack, until the end of the battle, add 6 to the Objective Control characteristic of this model.

other.name: Foul Infusion
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [Lethal Hits] ability. In addition, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+, instead of only on a 6.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Hyper blight grenades; Injector pistol; Plague knives.

other.name: Malicious Calculations
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack's Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

other.name: Seven-fold Chant
other.description: In your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, roll 2D6: on a 7+, you gain 1CP.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Close combat weapon; ➤ Plasma pistol - standard; ➤ Plasma pistol - supercharge.

other.name: Tainted Narthecium
other.description: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return 1 destroyed Bodyguard model to that unit.

other.name: Inflamed Infections
other.description: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model. Until the end of the phase, each time this model makes an attack that targets that unit, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit. If that unit is below Half-strength, an unmodified Hit roll of 4+ scores a Critical Hit instead.

composition.equipment: equipped with: Balesword; Bolt pistol.

other.name: Silent Bodyguard
other.description: While a ^^**Character^^** model is leading this unit, that ^^**Character^^** model has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

other.name: Death Approaches
other.description: In your Movement phase, when this unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all Afflicted enemy units, and more than 9" horizontally away from any other enemy units.
